scope_note: QA Control Stack Report family [118]: reader-facing report packaging [117] for external audiences. Contains theorem statement, one-line summaries for [106]/[105]/[110], a comparison table across domains (domain, initial/intermediate/target state, QA orbit path, path_length_k, move sequence), canonical PASS+FAIL witnesses, source refs. Validator recomputes the comparison table from domain_traces and checks faithfulness.
